data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding data deletion cascading to third parties.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where data deletion cascades to third parties, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this behavior. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the specific requirement of confirming the cascading deletion effect, leading to an inconclusive status. Therefore, without concrete evidence, the validation cannot be completed.
gaps: No evidence of the cascading deletion behavior to third-party integrations.
